'''âl-g-r''' ('''kalagar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modernise|modernise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modernise|modernise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-g-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalagar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilagar|thilagar]] || [[word:jilagar|jilagar]] || [[word:shilagar|shilagar]] || [[word:kilagar|kilagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulagar|thuthulagar]] || [[word:jujulagar|jujulagar]] || [[word:shushulagar|shushulagar]] || [[word:kukulagar|kukulagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulagar|thulagar]] || [[word:julagar|julagar]] || [[word:shulagar|shulagar]] || [[word:kulagar|kulagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulagar|thulagar]] || [[word:julagar|julagar]] || [[word:shulagar|shulagar]] || [[word:kulagar|kulagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelagar|thelagar]] || [[word:jelagar|jelagar]] || [[word:shelagar|shelagar]] || [[word:kelagar|kelagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholagar|thotholagar]] || [[word:jojolagar|jojolagar]] || [[word:shosholagar|shosholagar]] || [[word:kokolagar|kokolagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholagar|tholagar]] || [[word:jolagar|jolagar]] || [[word:sholagar|sholagar]] || [[word:kolagar|kolagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholagar|tholagar]] || [[word:jolagar|jolagar]] || [[word:sholagar|sholagar]] || [[word:kolagar|kolagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlagar|thĂŠlagar]] || [[word:jĂŠlagar|jĂŠlagar]] || [[word:shĂŠlagar|shĂŠlagar]] || [[word:kĂŠlagar|kĂŠlagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalagar|thathalagar]] || [[word:jajalagar|jajalagar]] || [[word:shashalagar|shashalagar]] || [[word:kakalagar|kakalagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalagar|thalagar]] || [[word:jalagar|jalagar]] || [[word:shalagar|shalagar]] || [[word:kalagar|kalagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalagar|thalagar]] || [[word:jalagar|jalagar]] || [[word:shalagar|shalagar]] || [[word:kalagar|kalagar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalagar|shalagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalagar|goshalagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalagar|gokishalagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalagarnĂŒ|shalagarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalagarnknĂŒ|goshalagarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagarnĂŒ|gokishalagarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalagarshĂ«|shalagarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalagarnkshĂ«|goshalagarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalagarshĂ«|gokishalagarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagaro|shalagaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagarnkro|goshalagarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagaro|gokishalagaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagarmu|shalagarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagarnkmu|goshalagarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagarmu|gokishalagarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalagarsher|shalagarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalagarnksher|goshalagarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalagarsher|gokishalagarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalagarng|shalagarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalagarnkng|goshalagarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalagarng|gokishalagarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalagarya|shalagarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalagarnkya|goshalagarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalagarya|gokishalagarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalagaryam|shalagaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalagarnkyam|goshalagarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalagaryam|gokishalagaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagarnĂŒshĂ«|shalagarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalagarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalagarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagarnĂŒro|shalagarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagarnknĂŒro|goshalagarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagarnĂŒro|gokishalagarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagarnĂŒmu|shalagarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagarnknĂŒmu|goshalagarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagarnĂŒmu|gokishalagarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagarshĂ«nĂŒ|shalagarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalagarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalagarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagarshĂ«ro|shalagarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagarnkshĂ«ro|goshalagarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagarshĂ«ro|gokishalagarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagarshĂ«mu|shalagarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagarnkshĂ«mu|goshalagarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagarshĂ«mu|gokishalagarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagaronĂŒ|shalagaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagarnkronĂŒ|goshalagarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagaronĂŒ|gokishalagaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagaroshĂ«|shalagaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagarnkroshĂ«|goshalagarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagaroshĂ«|gokishalagaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagaromu|shalagaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagarnkromu|goshalagarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagaromu|gokishalagaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagarmunĂŒ|shalagarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagarnkmunĂŒ|goshalagarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagarmunĂŒ|gokishalagarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagarmushĂ«|shalagarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagarnkmushĂ«|goshalagarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagarmushĂ«|gokishalagarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagarmuro|shalagarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagarnkmuro|goshalagarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagarmuro|gokishalagarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
